recent_bad_license_projects.name: seekdb-mcp-server
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables interaction with seekdb database. This server allows AI assistants to perform vector operations, manage collections, execute SQL queries and leverage AI functions through a controlled interface, making database exploration and analysis safer and more structured.
